title: selaginella leveillei
intro: Selaginella leveillei, also known as Lev's spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella leveillei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and improve overall well-being. Selaginella leveillei is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and moisturizing properties.
